debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
v : Vector α n
idx : Fin n
elt : α
f : (idx : ℕ) → α → idx < n → β
⊢ (v.set (↑idx) elt ⋯).mapFinIdx f = (v.mapFinIdx f).set (↑idx) (f (↑idx) elt ⋯) ⋯

proof:
ext i
      simp only [Vector.getElem_mapFinIdx, Vector.getElem_set]
      split <;> rename_i h
      · simp only [h, Vector.getElem_mapFinIdx]
      · simp only [Vector.getElem_mapFinIdx]
failed_attempts:

      · simp [h1] at h2; subst h2; simp at h1
